theme_category: 清明文明祭扫与网络信息溯源

gold.rationale:
该样本文本的核心判断是：社交平台上被再次转发的“视频、电话缅怀先人”截图/说法，并非2026年清明期间发布的新规定或统一要求，而是源于更早年份（疫情防控语境下）的阶段性倡议，在传播过程中被截取、省略时间背景而造成误读，并且在2025年已有针对该类网传内容的公开澄清。该结论与可核验证据一致：来自中国互联网联合辟谣平台（转引“广西网络举报”微信公众号）的辟谣信息明确指出，网传内容被部分网民误认为是2026年发布，但实际发生于2022年疫情期间；同时提到2025年3月25日抖音号“河池广电・瞰河池”已发布声明视频解释时间背景，且当时因工作人员工作失误导致网民误解、事发后已整改并更正信息内容重新发布。因此，文本所强调的“时间错位”“旧内容在新年份节点被二次传播引发争议”“不能把疫情期间阶段性倡议误写成2026年统一政策或普遍要求”等关键表述，与上述公开辟谣材料的事实框架相符，未出现会改变受众对核心结论理解的关键性错误。

进一步看，样本文本并未主张“广西在2026年禁止线下祭扫”或“官方规定只能视频祭祖”，而是反向指出这正是误读的来源，并提醒应以当年当地发布为准；这与辟谣材料中“属翻炒旧闻引流的不实信息”的定性一致：不实之处在于把历史情境下的信息当作当下新规传播。文本还补充了传播机制层面的解释（截图式传播、年份与适用条件被省略、转发文案诱导为硬性要求），这类描述与辟谣信息中提到的“被误认为是2026年发布”“因工作失误造成误解、已更正重新发布”等传播链条高度一致，属于对已披露事实的合理归纳，并未添加与证据相冲突的具体新事实指控。基于以上，样本核心表达成立，且关键时间点（2022年为起源背景、2025年出现澄清说明、2026年清明前旧闻再传播引发讨论）与可用证据可对齐，故可判定为 True。

atoms: A group of people standing in a village courtyard looking at a large LED screen.
The LED screen displays a banner with the text '倡议：清明节绿色祭祀，文明缅怀' (Proposal: Green Memorialization for Qingming Festival, Civilized Remembrance).
The screen graphic features a pine tree branch and white flowers.
Several people in the group are holding small bouquets of white flowers.
The background shows traditional white-walled houses with tiled roofs and misty mountains.
A man in the center appears to be speaking or gesturing towards the screen.
A man and a woman standing at a table with a laptop and a smartphone in a public square.
The man is pointing at the laptop screen while the woman looks on.
A red banner hangs in the background with yellow text reading '安全文明祭祀 严防森林火灾' (Safe and Civilized Memorialization, Strictly Prevent Forest Fires).
The laptop screen displays a webpage with a green header and text.
The smartphone screen shows a social media interface with a green banner.
Pedestrians are walking in the background under a covered walkway.
A young man holding a smartphone showing a video to a group of older villagers.
The villagers are gathered in a courtyard with traditional wooden houses and smoke rising in the background.
A blue text overlay at the bottom reads '广西某地：村民热议“网传号召”，清明祭祀新风引关注' (Guangxi Certain Place: Villagers Discuss 'Online Call', Qingming Memorialization New Trends Attract Attention).
The smartphone screen shows a video thumbnail with the text '视频缅怀' (Video Remembrance).
A woman wearing a face mask looking at a public notice board.
The notice board has a header '地区民服务务布助通' (Regional Civil Service Information Distribution).
A large white paper notice is pinned to the board with a red stamp.
The notice title reads '关于“清明节视频缅怀先人”不实信息的情况说明' (Explanation Regarding False Information on 'Qingming Festival Video Remembrance of Ancestors').
The text on the notice discusses the context of the rumor and clarifies it is not a current requirement.
Pedestrians walk on the street in the background.
A man sitting at a table explaining something to another person.
The man holds a smartphone displaying a video titled '视频缅怀' (Video Remembrance) and a blue booklet.
A poster in the background reads '网络安全防范' (Cybersecurity Prevention).
The man is pointing at the phone screen while speaking.
The setting appears to be an office or community center.
A man pointing at a large white notice posted on a glass board.
The notice has a large red title '广西某地倡议清明节视频缅怀先人' (Guangxi Certain Place Proposes Qingming Festival Video Remembrance of Ancestors).
Below the title, smaller text explains the proposal and mentions '不实谣言' (False Rumor) in large red characters.
The date '2020年3月21日' (March 21, 2020) is visible at the bottom of the notice.
Several people wearing face masks are standing nearby.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A group of villagers in a rural setting gather around a large outdoor LED screen displaying a proposal for green memorialization. Several individuals hold flowers, suggesting a memorial context.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 倡议：清明节绿色祭祀，文明缅怀
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The image shows a visual proposal for 'green memorialization' which aligns with the post's discussion of 'civilized memorialization'.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A man and woman examine a laptop and phone at a table in a public square. A red banner in the background explicitly warns against forest fires during memorialization.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 安全文明祭祀 严防森林火灾
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The banner reinforces the safety aspect of memorialization mentioned in the post.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A young man shows a video on his phone to a group of elderly villagers in a traditional courtyard. A caption overlay identifies the location and topic.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 广西某地：村民热议“网传号召”，清明祭祀新风引关注
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The caption directly references the 'online call' and 'new trends' discussed in the post.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A woman reads a notice on a bulletin board that explicitly addresses false rumors about video remembrance. The notice clarifies the context.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 地区民服务务布助通 | 关于“清明节视频缅怀先人”不实信息的情况说明
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The notice serves as the official correction mentioned in the post regarding the 'false information'.

visual_indicators.scene_description: An official or community worker explains a video on a phone to a resident, with a cybersecurity poster in the background.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 网络安全防范 | 视频缅怀
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The scene depicts the explanation of the 'video remembrance' concept.

visual_indicators.scene_description: A man points to a notice on a glass board that labels the 'video remembrance' proposal as a 'false rumor' and dates it to 2020.
visual_indicators.ocr_text: 广西某地倡议清明节视频缅怀先人 | 不实谣言 | 2020年3月21日
visual_indicators.image_text_alignment_hint: The notice provides the specific date (2020) and labels the content as a rumor, matching the post's timeline analysis.

cross_modal: image_1 is presented as visual evidence of a 'Green Memorial' initiative, contrasting with the post's claim that the specific 'video memorial' rumor is a misinterpretation of 2022 context.
image_2 is used to illustrate the post's claim about the 'video memorial' rumor being circulated on social media platforms like Douyin.
image_3 is presented as visual evidence of the rumor's spread, showing villagers reacting to the 'video memorial' call.
image_4 is offered as proof of the post's claim that the rumor was debunked by a 'false information explanation' notice.
image_5 is used to illustrate the post's claim that the rumor was clarified by a specific Douyin account 'Hechi Broadcasting'.
image_6 is presented as visual evidence of the post's claim that the rumor was labeled 'false rumor' by local authorities.

cross_modal_findings.post_claim_about_image: The post uses this image to represent the 'Green Memorial' (Green Tomb-Sweeping) initiative that is often cited as the correct alternative to the 'video memorial' rumor.
cross_modal_findings.what_image_shows: A group of people standing in front of a large LED screen displaying a 'Green Memorial' (Green Tomb-Sweeping) initiative with pine trees and flowers.
cross_modal_findings.image_text_alignment_hint: AGREE_PARTIALLY: The image shows a legitimate 'Green Memorial' initiative, which the post uses to contrast with the 'video memorial' rumor it is debunking.

cross_modal_findings.post_claim_about_image: The post uses this image to illustrate the rumor's circulation on social media platforms, specifically mentioning Douyin.
cross_modal_findings.what_image_shows: A man and a woman looking at a laptop and smartphone displaying social media interfaces in a public square.
cross_modal_findings.image_text_alignment_hint: AGREE_PARTIALLY: The image depicts people checking social media, which aligns with the post's claim about the rumor spreading on platforms like Douyin.

cross_modal_findings.post_claim_about_image: The post uses this image as visual evidence of the rumor's spread, showing villagers reacting to the 'video memorial' call.
cross_modal_findings.what_image_shows: A group of villagers, including an elderly woman and a younger man, looking at a smartphone together in a village setting.
cross_modal_findings.explicit_caption_or_overlay: 广西某地：村民热议“网传号召”，清明祭祀新风引关注
cross_modal_findings.image_text_alignment_hint: AGREE: The image caption explicitly mentions villagers discussing the 'online call' (rumor) and the 'new style of Qingming memorial', which matches the post's narrative.

cross_modal_findings.post_claim_about_image: The post uses this image as proof that the rumor was debunked by a 'false information explanation' notice.
cross_modal_findings.what_image_shows: A woman looking at a notice board with a paper titled 'Regarding the false information situation of the 'video memorial' rumor'.
cross_modal_findings.image_text_alignment_hint: AGREE: The notice board explicitly addresses the 'video memorial' rumor and labels it as false information, supporting the post's claim.

cross_modal_findings.post_claim_about_image: The post uses this image to illustrate the clarification provided by the Douyin account 'Hechi Broadcasting'.
cross_modal_findings.what_image_shows: A man explaining something to another person while holding a smartphone and a document, with a 'Network Security Prevention' poster in the background.
cross_modal_findings.image_text_alignment_hint: AGREE_PARTIALLY: The image shows an explanation session regarding network security and information, which aligns with the post's claim about the Douyin account clarifying the rumor.

cross_modal_findings.post_claim_about_image: The post uses this image as visual evidence of the rumor being labeled 'false rumor' by local authorities.
cross_modal_findings.what_image_shows: A man pointing at a large poster on a bus stop that explicitly states 'False Rumor' (不实谣言) regarding the 'video memorial' initiative.
cross_modal_findings.image_text_alignment_hint: AGREE: The poster explicitly labels the 'video memorial' initiative as a 'false rumor', directly supporting the post's claim.

retrieved_evidence.text: 【“广西某地倡议清明节视频缅怀先人”不实】近日，一则“广西某县委宣传部倡议清明节通过视频、电话缅怀先人”的信息在网络流传，被部分网民误认为是2026年发布的清明祭扫倡议，引发议论。事实上，2025年3月25日，“河池广电・瞰河池”抖音号就已发布声明视频，网传文章所述事件实际发生于2022年疫情期间，因为疫情防控需要才提出缅怀倡议，当时因工作人员工作失误导致网民误解，事发当时已进行整改，并更正信息内容和重新发布。所以网传文章属翻炒旧闻引流的不实信息。在此提醒广大网民不信谣、不传谣，共同维护清朗网络空间。（来源：“广西网络举报”微信公众号）
近日，有关“广西某县委宣传部倡议清明节通过视频、电话缅怀先人”的截图在网络平台再次传播，被部分网民理解为针对2026年清明节祭扫活动的新倡议，引发留言讨论与转发。据多名网民反映，相关内容在部分社交账号中被配以“最新通知”等字样，进一步加深了公众对其时间背景的混淆。当地宣传和网信等部门注意到这一情况后表示，正在通过多种渠道说明相关信息形成的过程，并提醒公众留意政策发布时间与适用时段。
围绕“广西某县委宣传部倡议清明节通过视频、电话缅怀先人”的话题，相关时间线可追溯至2022年疫情防控阶段，当时为减少人员聚集提出了临时性倡议。2025年，一些账号发布说明性短片，对早期内容的表述和发布环节进行了更正与重发。2026年清明前后，再度流传的文字被部分网民误解为最新政策，引发对2022、2025、2026三个时间节点的溯源梳理。
据广西有关部门工作人员近日介绍，网络上传播的“线上缅怀、减少聚集”倡议文本，实际对应的是2022年疫情防控阶段的清明节祭扫工作安排。当时当地根据疫情形势提出通过网络平台、电话等方式追思先人，以减少集中祭扫活动的人流聚集。据参与当年工作的人员回忆，该倡议是在统筹防控需要和群众祭祀习俗的背景下形成的，适用范围和时间节点均与当前阶段的常态化管理有明显区别。
短视频平台近年成为地方机构和媒体发布清明文明祭扫倡议的重要渠道。据网络平台运营方介绍，关于“广西某地倡议清明节视频缅怀先人”的内容，最初发布时间集中在2022年疫情防控阶段，后续在2025年又有账号对旧有内容进行说明和重新发布。平台页面上显示的账号名称、发布时间和更新记录，为澄清该倡议并非2026年新规提供了可查询的时间线依据。
在当前清明文明祭扫实践中，不少墓区推出以鲜花祭奠、鞠躬默哀、植树纪念等方式取代焚烧纸钱和燃放鞭炮。广西一些地方在宣传材料中突出“文明、绿色、节约、安全”的理念，引导群众通过整洁墓碑、献花寄哀思等形式缅怀逝者。相较于2022年疫情时期强调“非接触式”祭扫的阶段性倡议，如今更多政策侧重于在保障群众祭扫需求的前提下，推动长期的文明祭祀习惯养成。
广西“网络举报”微信公众号近日对有关网络传播线索进行了梳理和提示，指出近期部分平台上再次出现的清明节线上缅怀倡议截图，实为早年疫情阶段内容被转发，导致时间语境发生错位。据该公众号推送信息介绍，此类旧内容在缺乏清晰时间标记情况下被再次传播，容易引起公众对现行政策的判断混淆。相关提醒呼吁网民在转发前注意查验来源与发布时间，理性看待网络信息。
在清明文明祭扫主题宣传中，宣传部、民政部门与公墓经营单位常协同开展多层次倡导，包括设置咨询点、发放倡议书、通过网站和新媒体发布提示等。针对“广西某地倡议清明节视频缅怀先人”的网络讨论，一些地方还增加了信息溯源内容，向群众解释相关倡议产生于2022年疫情防控时期，并非普遍长期政策，以提高公众辨识历史信息和现行政策的能力。
记者从当地媒体获悉，2025年3月25日，“河池广电·瞰河池”抖音号曾发布一则说明视频，就此前在网络上流传的清明祭扫倡议内容作出解释。视频中，编辑人员详细说明了相关倡议形成于2022年疫情防控期间，并非针对2026年的新安排，同时梳理了早前传播中出现的易引起误解的表述。据介绍，该短视频发布后在当地社交平台获得一定播放量，部分网民在评论区对澄清说明表示关注。
据知情人士回忆，相关清明节倡议信息在最初对外发布时，曾因工作人员在编辑与标注时间等环节的疏忽，未能充分提示其特定适用年份，引发部分网民将其视作当年最新安排的误解。当地单位随后对有关页面进行了整改，补充时间背景说明，修订部分表述，并通过重新发布等方式提醒公众关注信息发布时间。有工作人员称，今后将进一步规范公示流程，减少类似情况出现。
近年来，学者和媒体在讨论清明节与网络行为时，注意到传统祭祀方式与数字化哀悼方式的并存现象。2022年疫情期间流行的“云祭扫”“线上纪念馆”等形式，在广西等地一度被倡议作为减少聚集的替代选项，而后逐步转变为自愿、多样化的纪念方式。围绕“通过视频、电话缅怀先人”的表述，也被置于更广泛的社会转型背景中，被视为数字技术参与传统节日的一种阶段性尝试。
疫情防控期间，广西及全国多地公共场所曾广泛张贴防疫提示牌，强调佩戴口罩、保持间距、减少聚集等要求。清明节等传统祭祀节点，部分地区结合当时防控政策，倡导群众通过电话、网络视频等方式表达对先人的缅怀，以降低集中祭扫带来的风险。随着防控形势变化，这类阶段性倡议已不再普遍适用，但其历史背景仍是理解网络流传内容的重要参照。
清明节相关网络信息的传播轨迹显示，早在2022年疫情防控背景下形成的部分倡议文本，在后续几年被多次转载、截取和二次加工。有关“通过视频、电话缅怀先人”的提法，本意是特定时期的替代性安排，却在2026年前后重新被部分账号以简化文字传播。据舆情研究人士分析，这种跨年度、跨场景的再传播容易脱离原有情境，从而引发公众对政策是否仍在执行的误读。
网络平台内容管理部门指出，地方机构及媒体在清明前发布文明祭扫提醒时，逐渐加强对旧内容的标注和归档管理，例如注明发布年份、适用背景及是否为疫情期间特别措施。以广西某县为例，相关账号在2025年发布的视频中，对2022年倡议的适用范围和时效进行了说明，试图避免公众将其误认为是2026年仍然有效的祭扫规定，这反映出官方信息在网络传播中不断校正的过程。
信息溯源实践在本案中具有典型意义：从追踪最初的发布主体和时间，到比对2022年防控通知、2025年的更正说明，再到2026年网民的转发和评论，形成了完整的传播链条。据网络安全与舆情监测机构介绍，对清明祭扫类信息进行年份标注、来源核实和上下文补充，有助于厘清广西等地“阶段性倡议”与当前常态化文明祭扫要求之间的界限，减少误读和不必要的社会担忧。
多名从事公共政策与媒体报道的业内人士近日表示，在撰写与清明祭扫等社会关切议题相关的文章时，将更加注意区分各地历史性疫情期间出台的阶段性倡议与当前年度的实际安排。据介绍，相关写作与编辑工作将避免将某地在特定年份防控背景下形成的倡议表述为2026年层面的统一政策或普遍要求，而是明确其为当时具体语境中的管理措施及信息发布流程问题，以减少读者对时间和适用范围的误读。

text_analysis.alignment_reasoning: The post accurately identifies the core event (2022 context misattributed to 2026) and cites the correct source (Hechi Broadcasting), but it presents the event as a recurring 'old screenshot' phenomenon without explicitly confirming the specific 2020/2022 date found in the evidence, creating a slight temporal ambiguity.
text_analysis.t3_evidence: The post implies the rumor is a generic 'old screenshot' circulating in 2026 without anchoring the specific origin year, whereas evidence [1] and [3] explicitly state the event occurred in 2022 and was clarified in 2025, making the '2026 new initiative' framing a context error.
t3_problematic_subclaims: The post treats the rumor as a general 'old screenshot' phenomenon without specifying the 2022 origin date that evidence [1] confirms.
The post frames the 2026 discussion as a new cycle of 'old content' without explicitly stating the specific 2022/2025 timeline provided in evidence [3].
text_analysis.c1_evidence: The post text discusses a 'video memorial' rumor and a 'green memorial' initiative context, but image_1 (01_img_1.jpg) explicitly shows a proposal for 'Green Memorialization' (绿色祭祀) on an LED screen, which contradicts the post's focus on the specific 'video/phone' rumor as the primary subject of the image evidence.
c1_problematic_subclaims: The post text focuses on the 'video/phone memorial' rumor, but image_1 depicts a 'Green Memorialization' proposal on an LED screen, creating a semantic mismatch between the text's specific rumor and the image's general green initiative content.
text_analysis.global_assessment: The post is factually grounded in the 2022/2025 timeline but suffers from slight temporal ambiguity regarding the specific origin year and uses imagery that partially conflates the specific 'video' rumor with a broader 'green memorial' initiative.

images.explanation: The image shows a 'Green Memorial' event, which contradicts the post's claim that this image proves the 'video memorial' rumor or its debunking.

judge.level3_rationale: 本文准确还原了‘视频缅怀’谣言的2022年疫情起源、2025年官方澄清及2026年误传的时间线，核心事实与证据一致；仅开头将谣言概括为‘老截图’现象时未显式锚定2022年具体年份，属于轻微的语境铺垫偏差，不影响整体结论的真实性。
judge.reasoning_trace: The post is factually accurate regarding the timeline and official responses. The T3 label arises from the framing of the rumor as a generic 'old screenshot' issue in the intro, which is slightly less specific than the detailed evidence provided later in the text.
judge.core_claim: The post explains that a rumor claiming 'Guangxi authorities proposed video/phone memorialization for Qingming' is a misinterpretation of a 2022 pandemic-era initiative that was clarified in 2025, and warns against treating it as a 2026 new policy.
key_subclaims: The rumor originated from a 2022 pandemic context where video/phone memorialization was proposed to reduce gathering risks.
In 2025, the Douyin account 'Hechi Broadcasting' clarified the rumor was not a 2026 new initiative.
In 2026, the rumor resurfaces as 'old screenshots' without time context, causing public confusion.
The rumor is officially labeled as 'false information' by local authorities.
The post uses images to illustrate the 'green memorial' initiative, the rumor's spread, and the official clarifications.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The rumor originated from a 2022 pandemic context where video/phone memorialization was proposed to reduce gathering risks.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence [1] and [4] confirm the 2022 pandemic context and the specific purpose of the initiative.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: In 2025, the Douyin account 'Hechi Broadcasting' clarified the rumor was not a 2026 new initiative.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence [1] and [9] explicitly state the 2025 clarification by 'Hechi Broadcasting'.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: In 2026, the rumor resurfaces as 'old screenshots' without time context, causing public confusion.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence [2] and [3] describe the 2026 resurfacing and the resulting confusion regarding the timeline.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The rumor is officially labeled as 'false information' by local authorities.
subclaim_findings.note: Evidence [1] and [7] confirm the official labeling of the content as false/rumorous.

subclaim_findings.subclaim: The post uses images to illustrate the 'green memorial' initiative, the rumor's spread, and the official clarifications.
subclaim_findings.note: Images 1-6 visually depict the scenes described in the text (villagers, notices, officials).

judge.verdict_reasoning: The post accurately describes the timeline and context of the rumor (2022 origin, 2025 clarification, 2026 resurfacing) and cites correct sources. The only L2 label is T3, as the post frames the rumor as a 'recurring old screenshot' phenomenon without explicitly anchoring the specific 2022 origin date in the opening summary, though the detailed body text corrects this. This is a minor framing issue that does not change the core truth.

image_findings.explanation: The image shows a 'Green Memorialization' proposal, which aligns with the post's broader discussion of 'civilized memorialization' and the context of the rumor's origin.
The image depicts people checking digital devices in a public square, illustrating the digital aspect of the memorialization discussion.
The image shows villagers discussing a phone video, directly visualizing the 'video memorial' rumor and the villagers' reaction mentioned in the text.
The image shows a notice board explicitly addressing 'false information' regarding video memorialization, matching the post's claim about official clarifications.
The image shows an official explaining a video on a phone, illustrating the 'clarification' process mentioned in the text.
The image shows a notice labeling the rumor as 'false' and dating it to 2020, supporting the post's timeline analysis.
